Bringing hope

in forgotten

conflicts

We go where

others won't

Away from

the headlines

Since 2004, we’ve provided humanitarian assistance for food, shelter, health, education and more

Who We Are

What we do

Emergency Relief
Child Education
Women's Empowerment
Disability Equality
Livelihoods
Healthcare Provision
Conflict Resolution
Advocacy
Emergency Relief
Life-saving assistance to victims of conflict or disaster
Find Out More
Child Education
Inclusive and safe teaching for boys and girls
Find Out More
Women's Empowerment
Gender equality is central to long-term recovery
Find Out More
Disability Equality
Breaking the stigma of disability in the South Caucasus
Find Out More
Livelihoods
Enabling isolated communities to live independent and fulfilling lives
Find Out More
Healthcare Provision
Practical and ongoing support to people without access to mainstream services
Find Out More
Conflict Resolution
Supporting local peacebuilders in forgotten conflicts
Find Out More
Advocacy
In a noisy world, we amplify forgotten voices
Find Out More

We work in partnership with
local people

All of our projects are led by in-country experts who bring sustainable change to their communities.

Not to be reproduced without permission | Privacy Policy | Terms & Conditions

We use necessary cookies to make our site work. We'd also like to set analytics cookies that help us make improvements by measuring how you use the site. These will be set only if you accept
Privacy Policy

Your privacy settings

We and our partners use information collected through cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience on our site, analyse how you use it and for marketing purposes. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer. In some cases, data obtained from cookies is shared with third parties for analytics or marketing reasons. You can exercise your right to opt-out of that sharing at any time by disabling cookies.
Privacy Policy
Allow all

Manage Consent Preferences

Necessary

Always ON
Necessary cookies enable core functionality. The website cannot function properly without these cookies, and can only be disabled by changing your browser preferences.

Analytics

We'd like to collect website analytics information using Google Analytics to help us improve the website. The data is collected in a way that does not directly identify anyone. For more information please see our Cookies page.
Confirm my choices Allow all
My Consent Preferences
